sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Oppenheimer initiates Passage Bio stock with outperform rating
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has initiated coverage of Passage Bio Inc. (NASDAQ:PASG) with an outperform rating and a price target of $30.00, suggesting a significant upside of 385% from its current price. The firm believes the stock's 46% year-to-date decline is an overreaction to competitor program failures and regulatory concerns, presenting a buying opportunity. Oppenheimer highlighted key differentiators for Passage Bio's lead asset PBFT02 in frontotemporal dementia, projecting $1 billion in peak risk-adjusted sales by 2040.

feed.title: Tokenization push and $1M note shape Oxbridge Re (NASDAQ: OXBR)
feed.summary: Oxbridge Re Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: OXBR) has filed its 2025 annual report, highlighting its continued focus on fully collateralized property and casualty reinsurance, particularly for Gulf Coast insurers. The company is actively developing a Web3 tokenization platform through its SurancePlus subsidiary, issuing tokenized reinsurance securities like DeltaCat Re and EpsilonCat Re, and recently launched T42:2027 and T20:2027 tokens. Additionally, Oxbridge Re secured a $1 million secured promissory note with a 16% interest rate for working capital, and the report outlines various regulatory, capital, and operational risks associated with its traditional and new tokenization businesses.

feed.title: Pathfinder Bancorp declares $0.10 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ:PBHC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share for its voting common and non-voting common stock, payable on May 8, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 17, 2026. The company also declared a $0.10 per notional share dividend for issued warrants. This dividend represents a 3.14% yield, and the company has consistently paid dividends for 31 consecutive years, demonstrating a strong commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: How workers at California's last nuclear plant use generative AI to save time
feed.summary: PG&E's Diablo Canyon nuclear power plant, California's last, has implemented a generative AI tool called Neutron to manage its extensive paperwork. This AI solution drastically reduces the time needed to find critical documents, improving efficiency in regulatory compliance and operations. Developed by Atomic Canyon in collaboration with PG&E, Neutron is the first on-site generative AI tool at a U.S. nuclear plant, highlighting AI's potential to streamline highly regulated industries.

feed.title: PAVmed Inc. 2025 Q4 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NASDAQ:PAVM) 2026-03-30
feed.summary: PAVmed Inc. (PAVM) released its 2025 Q4 earnings, reporting an EPS of -$1.05, beating estimates by $3.45. The company's revenue reached $52.00K, a 420.00% year-over-year increase, also surpassing expectations by $52.00K. The article highlights the earnings call presentation slides published by PAVmed Inc.

feed.title: OraSure Defends Strategy Amid Activist Altai Governance Challenge
feed.summary: OraSure Technologies is defending its performance and governance against activist investor Altai Capital's challenge, asserting that its shareholder returns have met or exceeded those of its peers. The company highlights its focused growth strategy, new diagnostic products, cost-cutting measures, and a debt-free balance sheet with share repurchases as evidence of its commitment to shareholder value. An analyst has a Hold rating on OSUR stock with a $3.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rates OSUR as Neutral due to past financial underperformance balanced by signs of stabilization and a promising product pipeline.

feed.title: Assessing Old Second Bancorp (OSBC) Valuation After Evergreen Bank Acquisition Progress
feed.summary: Old Second Bancorp (OSBC) is currently trading at $19.57 and is considered undervalued with a fair value of $23.83, primarily due to the successful integration of the Evergreen Bank acquisition. This acquisition is enhancing profitability and improving asset mix, expected to drive revenue growth and strengthen net interest margin. Despite a slight recent share price softness, longer-term shareholders have seen a 19.34% total return over the past year.

feed.title: Ondas Holdings Faces Challenges Amidst Financial Strain
feed.summary: Ondas Holdings (ONDS) is facing significant financial challenges, reporting a Q4 net loss of $101 million and struggling profitability ratios despite a recent speculative stock surge. The article highlights the volatility of ONDS stock, influenced by speculative trading rather than strong fundamentals, and emphasizes the need for Ondas to improve its financial health and profitability for future stability. Analysts express concern over the underlying financial vulnerabilities, urging thorough analysis before engaging in such speculative investments.

feed.title: Origin Materials explores business combinations amid mounting losses
feed.summary: Origin Materials Inc. is facing slower-than-expected sales for its recyclable PET plastic bottle caps and is now exploring potential business combinations and technology licensing deals. The company reported this Friday, indicating a shift in strategy due to mounting losses and delayed market adoption of its product.

feed.title: OptimizeRx (NASDAQ: OPRX) switches auditors from UHY LLP to Grant Thornton
feed.summary: OptimizeRx (NASDAQ: OPRX) has announced a change in its independent auditor, dismissing UHY LLP and appointing Grant Thornton LLP for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026. UHY's audit reports for 2024 and 2025 were unqualified, meaning there were no adverse opinions or disagreements, despite a previously disclosed material weakness in internal control over financial reporting related to third-party data. This change appears to be a standard transition as there were no disagreements or reportable events between OptimizeRx and UHY.

feed.title: Director Loo Took Gee reports initial status at OMS Energy (OMSE) on Form 3
feed.summary: OMS Energy Technologies Inc. director Loo Took Gee has filed an initial Form 3, indicating his position as a director but not a ten percent owner. The filing, dated March 30, 2026, details no reported transactions or derivative positions for Mr. Loo, acting as an opening inventory of his beneficial ownership. This transparency tool helps investors monitor significant stakes and potential conflicts of interest within the company.

feed.title: Holder sells repeated 4,150‑share blocks in ONON (ONON) filing
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing for On Holding AG (ONON) reveals a holder is repeatedly selling blocks of 4,150 Class A Ordinary Shares. The filing indicates a reported position of 58,100 Class A Ordinary Shares and notes 296,873,353 shares outstanding as of March 30, 2026. These continuous disposals from January to March 2026 suggest a systematic liquidation strategy by a single holder.

feed.title: Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bull 2X Shares (NUGT) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This article provides the current stock price quote and chart for Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bull 2X Shares (NUGT), an ETF offering 2x leveraged exposure to gold and silver mining firms. It details trading conditions, key statistics like previous close, open price, 1-year change, and intraday range. The article also includes a section with recent articles about other companies like NVIDIA, Tesla, Siemens Energy, and BYD, and client reviews for the trading platform.

feed.title: Empire State Realty OP LP Hits New 52-Week Low at $4.78
feed.summary: Empire State Realty OP LP has hit a new 52-week low of $4.78, down from its high of $8.75, as of March 27, 2026. The microcap company has a market capitalization of $1,394 million, a P/E ratio of 29.00, no dividend yield, and a high debt-equity ratio, with a return on equity of 0.00%. Its performance over the past year has lagged behind the S&P 500, which increased by 11.87%.

feed.title: [8-K] Newton Golf Company, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Newton Golf Company, Inc. announced a significant leadership change, terminating Greg Campbell as Executive Chairman, Chief Executive Officer, and principal executive officer on March 27, 2026. Co-founder Akinobu Yorihiro was appointed Interim Chief Executive Officer, while Brett Hoge became the new Chairperson of the Board. Yorihiro, who also remains Chief Technology Officer, brings extensive experience in M&A and leadership roles from previous companies.

feed.title: NMAX SEC Filings - NEWSMAX INC 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive overview of NEWSMAX (NMAX) SEC filings, including annual 10-K reports, quarterly 10-Q statements, and 8-K material events. It details how the company, an emerging growth company in broadcasting and digital media, reports financial performance, governance, and significant events to the SEC. The platform offers AI-powered summaries for each filing, helping investors quickly grasp key information on revenue trends, segment performance, and governance changes.

feed.title: Technology Solutions (NYSE: CNTM) seeks 15-day extension to file 10-K
feed.summary: ConnectM Technology Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: CNTM) has announced that it will delay filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company notified the SEC through a Form NT 10-K, citing delays in completing financial statement documentation. ConnectM expects to file the report within the 15-calendar-day extension period as allowed by Rule 12b-25 and anticipates no significant change in its operational results for the period.

feed.title: NXDT’s shift to a REIT structure Presents a Strong Buy Opportunity for Reliable Income Despite External Adviser Risk Premium
feed.summary: NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust (NXDT) has transitioned to a REIT structure, moving from an investment company focusing on diversified real estate holdings across various property types. This shift is expected to enhance liquidity and transparency, making it an attractive option for income-focused investors, despite the inherent risks associated with an external advisory model. The article details the financial implications and portfolio strategies for this new structure, emphasizing its role as an income-generating asset rather than a total return vehicle, with the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting being crucial for governance and investor engagement.

feed.title: Kris Malkoski Newell Brands EXPO Brings Sunshine Back To the Classroom
feed.summary: Newell Brands' EXPO has successfully reintroduced its yellow dry-erase marker, previously discontinued due to poor visibility. Kris Malkoski, CEO of Learning & Development, spearheaded a four-year R&D effort to double the ink's boldness while retaining erasability. The comeback campaign leverages color psychology, pop culture references, and tangible fan feedback to celebrate the return of yellow and the emotional joy it represents.

feed.title: Newell Brands (NASDAQ:NWL) Price Target Lowered to $3.00 at Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has lowered its price target for Newell Brands (NASDAQ:NWL) from $5.00 to $3.00, maintaining a "hold" rating, suggesting a potential 9.77% downside. This comes after Newell Brands reported Q4 EPS of $0.18 but issued a Q1 2026 guidance with a negative EPS range, amidst weaker revenue and a negative net margin. Despite mixed analyst ratings, the consensus remains a "Hold" with a target of $5.80.

feed.title: 22,000 Class A shares proposed sale — NUVL (NASDAQ: NUVL)
feed.summary: Nuvalent, Inc. (NASDAQ: NUVL) has filed a Form 144 to announce the proposed sale of 22,000 Class A Common shares on March 30, 2026, as a result of a stock option exercise. The filing also details prior open-market disposals by Darlene Noci of 4,000 shares on December 30, 2025, 5,500 shares on January 29, 2026, and another 5,500 shares on February 26, 2026. These transactions involve restricted or insider-held shares being sold to the public under Rule 144.

feed.title: Walmart Mexico Rolls Out Connected Store Platform
feed.summary: Walmart Mexico is expanding its partnership with Vusion to integrate the EdgeSense connected store platform across all Walmart Express stores, with plans to extend to Supercenters and test in Bodega formats. This initiative aims to modernize store operations with AI, enhance personalization, streamline the shopper experience, and boost associate productivity through the deployment of electronic shelf labels and smart rails. This marks the first major deployment of EdgeSense in Latin America, following a similar rollout in Walmart's U.S. stores.

feed.title: Prudential Financial, Inc. Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Market Challenges
feed.summary: Prudential Financial, Inc. has undergone a stock evaluation revision due to current market dynamics, with its stock priced at $93.22, showing a slight increase. However, the company has struggled with a -14.08% return over the past year, significantly underperforming the S&P 500's 18.81% return, and technical indicators suggest a bearish sentiment.

feed.title: Humana Inc (HUM) Shares Down 3.45% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Humana Inc (HUM) shares dropped 3.45% on March 30, closing at $169.09, significantly below its 52-week high. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $217.94, suggesting a 28.89% upside, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $506.32, implying a 199.44% upside, with a consensus "Hold" rating from brokerage firms.

feed.title: Cincinnati Financial Corp (CINF) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart | Capital.com Australia
feed.summary: This article provides current stock price information and trading conditions for Cincinnati Financial Corp (CINF) on Capital.com Australia. It details CFD trading specifics such as spreads, overnight funding adjustments, margins, and commissions. Key statistics like previous close, open, 1-year change, and day's range are also included.

feed.title: OGE Energy schedules April 29 webcast for quarterly results
feed.summary: OGE Energy (NYSE: OGE) has scheduled its first quarter 2026 earnings and business update conference call for Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET / 8:00 a.m. CT. The event will be a webcast accessible via the company's investor website, www.oge.com. This announcement continues OGE's pattern of regular quarterly communication, with previous earnings webcasts showing limited stock price impact unless accompanied by new financial data.

feed.title: RTX Lands $3.81B Navy Contract for F-35 F135 Engine Production
feed.summary: RTX Corp. has been awarded a $3.81 billion Navy contract modification for the production of F135 propulsion systems for the F-35 Joint Strike Fighter program. The contract covers Lot 18 definitization and Lot 19 production for the Air Force, Marine Corps, Navy, F-35 Cooperative Program Partners, and Foreign Military Sales customers. Work is expected to be completed by March 2028, with funding obligated from various fiscal years and sources.

feed.title: American Express Becomes Official NFL Payments Partner
feed.summary: American Express has secured a multi-year deal as the official payments partner of the National Football League, making it the exclusive payment network for the league. This partnership aims to provide innovative payment solutions and exclusive fan experiences, offering significant marketing and branding opportunities for American Express within the sports and entertainment industry. The agreement includes co-branded credit cards and payment processing services for the NFL and its teams, with the partnership commencing at the start of the 2026 NFL season.

feed.title: 3M India to Exit Precision Grinding & Finishing Business Following Global Sale
feed.summary: 3M India announced its exit from the Precision Grinding & Finishing (PG&F) business as a result of its parent company's global sale of the division to Nimbus. The Indian operations, which generated INR 26.00 crore in sales during FY 2024-25 and employed two people, will cease on April 1, 2026. 3M India will provide transitional support for up to 18 months to ensure customer continuity.

feed.title: General Motors (GM.US) Extends Suspension of Detroit EV Plant Operations Until Next Month 13th
feed.summary: General Motors (GM.US) is extending the suspension of operations at its Detroit electric vehicle plant until the 13th of next month to adjust production with current market demand. The plant, which produces models like the Chevrolet Silverado EV and Hummer EV, has been idle since last Monday and had its production already reduced by about 50% in January. This move comes as the industry sees a shift towards fuel-powered trucks and SUVs, with GM planning to boost heavy truck production at another Michigan plant starting in June.

feed.title: Retinal specialists drive clinical progress on modifier gene therapy, Ocugen, Inc. asserts
feed.summary: Ocugen, Inc. has commended retinal specialists for their crucial role in advancing modifier gene therapy through clinical trials and advisory input. These experts are instrumental in developing new treatment options for severe blindness conditions that currently have limited therapies. Ocugen continues to push gene therapy innovations in collaboration with leading medical professionals, having recently accelerated efforts in modifier gene therapies and celebrated women leaders in the field.

feed.title: Norwood Financial team joins networking at PA Association of Community Bankers Topgolf event
feed.summary: Norwood Financial actively participated in the PA Association of Community Bankers' "Swing into Spring" Topgolf event, where their team networked with banking professionals. This event, along with CEO Jim Donnelly's visit to Norwood Investment Corp. and Valerie O’Hare’s participation in the Women in Banking Conference, highlights the company's commitment to staff engagement and industry involvement.

feed.title: Nu Skin (NUS) CFO Chelsea Lantz discloses 42,100-share Class A stake
feed.summary: Nu Skin Enterprises' Chief Financial Officer, Chelsea K. Lantz, has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing her beneficial ownership of 42,100 shares of Class A Common Stock. This filing establishes her equity position as an executive officer. The Form 3 is an initial statement and does not represent a buy or sell transaction.

feed.title: NeuroSense (NASDAQ: NRSN) CTO discloses options, shares and RSU awards
feed.summary: NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd. CTO Niva Russek-Blum has filed an initial ownership report detailing her equity holdings in the company. The report includes 36,000 fully vested options at an exercise price of $2.18, significant blocks of ordinary shares totaling over 250,000, and 10,000 restricted share units with varying vesting schedules. These disclosures provide transparency regarding the executive's stake in NeuroSense.

feed.title: NeuroSense (NRSN) CTO awarded 200,000 restricted shares vesting over two years
feed.summary: NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd. (NRSN) Chief Technology Officer Niva Russek-Blum was granted 200,000 restricted Ordinary Shares as compensation. These shares, with a stated price of $0.00 per share, will vest in equal quarterly installments over a two-year period beginning March 26, 2026, contingent on her continued service. This grant increases her direct holdings to 467,953 Ordinary Shares and is subject to Section 102 of the Israeli Tax Ordinance for certain tax benefits.

feed.title: Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ:NSIT) Hits New 52-Week Low - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ:NSIT) recently hit a new 52-week low, trading as low as $63.72, down about 2.1%. Analyst sentiment has shifted to mixed-to-negative, with an average "Reduce" rating and a $100 consensus price target, and some firms cutting ratings and targets. Despite beating EPS expectations, revenue declined 1.2% year-over-year, although large institutions have increased their stakes.

feed.title: Baird Upgrades Novanta(NOVT.US) to Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $144
feed.summary: Baird has upgraded Novanta (NOVT.US) from Neutral to an Outperform (Buy) rating, while simultaneously cutting its price target to $144 from $155. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the company's stock despite a reduced price expectation.

feed.title: NIQ Global Intelligence (NYSE: NIQ) seeks ratification of EY, say-on-pay and capital reduction
feed.summary: NIQ Global Intelligence (NYSE: NIQ) will hold its 2026 Annual General Meeting on May 21, 2026, in Dublin. Shareholders are asked to vote on the election of four Class I directors, the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor, and advisory votes on executive compensation and its frequency. Additionally, the company seeks approval for share repurchase authority, treasury re-allotment pricing, and a capital reduction to create distributable reserves, which requires the Irish High Court's confirmation.

feed.title: Neumora tops Q4 earnings forecasts as pipeline advances, shares slip
feed.summary: The article indicates that Neumora exceeded fourth-quarter earnings forecasts, driven by progress in its pipeline. Despite the positive financial performance and pipeline advancements, the company's shares experienced a decline.

feed.title: Neumora Therapeutics: Downgrading After Navacaprant Development Setback (NASDAQ:NMRA)
feed.summary: Neumora Therapeutics has been downgraded from 'Strong Buy' to 'Hold' following the failure of its KOASTAL-1 study for navacaprant in Major Depressive Disorder (MDD). Although enrollment for KOASTAL-2 and KOASTAL-3 studies in MDD has increased with topline data expected in Q2 2026, success is uncertain. The company's NMRA-511 showed a promising signal for Alzheimer's Disease agitation in a Phase 1b study, particularly in patients with elevated anxiety, but a Phase 2 study is not anticipated until Q1 2027, delaying near-term value realization.

feed.title: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) director sells 3,644 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Cloudflare director John Graham-Cumming exercised stock options for 2,520 Class A shares at $44.72 and subsequently sold 3,644 shares in open-market transactions at weighted average prices between approximately $200 and $204 per share. These sales were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on May 28, 2025. After these transactions, Graham-Cumming retains a substantial direct holding of 494,067 Class A shares in Cloudflare.

feed.title: Natural Grocers Holds Virtual Hiring Event for Nutritional Health Coaching Roles
feed.summary: Natural Grocers is hosting a virtual hiring event on April 1st for over 30 nutritional health coaching positions nationwide. The company is unique as the only national grocery chain providing full-time in-store nutrition coaches. Successful candidates must have a degree or certification in a related field and will undergo extensive training, including 160 hours of ongoing education, along with receiving attractive benefits.

feed.title: [ARS] NATURAL HEALTH TRENDS CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Natural Health Trends Corp (NHTC) on March 30, 2026. The filing is categorized as having a low impact and neutral sentiment. It also provides an overview of NHTC's stock data, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Neurocrine Biosciences Inc (NBIX) Shares Down 3.14% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Neurocrine Biosciences Inc (NBIX) shares dropped 3.14% on March 30, trading at $128.30 after touching an intraday low of $128.02. This price is 19.90% below its 52-week high but 52.32% above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts maintain an "Outperform" rating with an average target price of $176.27, suggesting a potential upside of 37.39%, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $207.07.

feed.title: Nomadar Corp. Secures New Private Equity Financing
feed.summary: Nomadar Corp. recently secured an additional $1.738 million through a private placement, bringing its total recent capital raised to about $7.13 million. This new funding, part of a broader commitment from Sport City Cádiz, will support the expansion of Nomadar's global sports development platform and key infrastructure projects like the JP Financial Arena. The investment reflects growing investor confidence in Nomadar's integrated model for elite athlete development and fan engagement.

feed.title: Kindly MD Inc options imply 0.9% move in share price post-earnings
feed.summary: Pre-earnings option trading for Kindly MD Inc indicates a potential 0.9% movement in its share price. Call options are significantly outpacing puts, with implied volatility suggesting a minor 0c shift after earnings. Historically, the median share price move for the company post-earnings has been 1.8%.

feed.title: Maris-Tech (NASDAQ: MTEK) signs $3,007,329 at-the-market share deal
feed.summary: Maris-Tech Ltd. (NASDAQ: MTEK) has entered into a Sales Agreement with A.G.P./Alliance Global Partners for an at-the-market (ATM) offering of up to $3,007,329 of its ordinary shares. The company plans to use the net proceeds from these sales for working capital and general corporate purposes. Maris-Tech is not obligated to sell any shares and will pay the Sales Agent a 3.0% commission on aggregate gross proceeds.

feed.title: Tamara Lee Brown Buys 10,000 Shares of New Found Gold (CVE:NFG) Stock
feed.summary: New Found Gold director Tamara Lee Brown purchased 10,000 shares of the company's stock on March 30th at C$2.42 per share, totaling C$24,200, which increased her ownership by 149.25% to 16,700 shares. The stock traded at C$2.40 on Monday, with a market capitalization of C$828.51 million. New Found Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on gold deposits in Newfoundland and Labrador and Ontario, holding 100% interest in the Queensway project.

feed.title: MSGM SEC Filings - Motorsport Games Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to Motorsport Games Inc. (MSGM) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, detailing financial results, corporate governance, and insider activities. Recent filings highlight major shareholder disclosures, insider trading under Rule 10b5-1 plans, securing a revolving credit line, and Q3 2025 financial results. The platform offers AI-powered summaries for quick insights into these regulatory documents.

feed.title: ArcelorMittal (MT) posts 2025 parent financials and $61.4B revenue
feed.summary: ArcelorMittal has published its 2025 statutory financial statements for the parent company, reporting $61.4 billion in revenue. In 2025, the company produced 55.6 million metric tonnes of crude steel and 48.8 million tonnes of iron ore. ArcelorMittal operates in 60 countries with primary steelmaking operations in 14 countries, serving various industries including automotive and construction.
